nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 77. South southeast wind 0 to 5 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Sunny. High near 96, with temperatures falling to around 94 in the afternoon. Heat index values as high as 100. East wind 0 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
